scripts.deploy-ic: DFX_NETWORK=ic npm run extract-id  && nuxt generate && dfx deploy --network=ic
scripts.deploy-playground: DFX_NETWORK=playground npm run extract-id  && nuxt generate && dfx deploy --network=playground
scripts.deploy-local: DFX_NETWORK=local npm run extract-id && nuxt generate && dfx deploy
scripts.dev: DFX_NETWORK=local npm run extract-id  && nuxt dev
